final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon product listing image set (hero shot + lifestyle + detail), square crop
Primary request: Amazon product image suite for Evergreen branded hydration water bottle/cup — hero studio shot, lifestyle outdoor shot, and close-up detail shot
Scene/backdrop: clean white studio backdrop for hero; soft outdoor natural environment (greenery, daylight) for lifestyle shot; macro texture detail for close-up
Subject: premium hydration water bottle / tumbler cup with Evergreen branding — leaf icon embossed or printed on body, clean modern silhouette, metallic silver accents, smooth matte or semi-gloss surface
Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, studio-grade lighting, commercial e-commerce aesthetic
Composition/framing: hero shot centered on white background, 3/4 angle view; lifestyle shot with natural context, shallow depth of field; detail close-up of leaf icon and brand text on bottle surface
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio light for hero (no harsh shadows); warm natural daylight for lifestyle; macro ring light for detail — mood: clean, fresh, balanced, premium
Color palette: sky blue #A3CEF1 (dominant brand color on product), pink-violet #F1B2DC (accent elements / background wash), silver metallic #C0C0C0 (cap, ring, hardware details), white negative space
Materials/textures: smooth matte hydration bottle body, brushed silver metallic lid and band, subtle leaf texture emboss, water droplet condensation on surface
Text (verbatim): "Evergreen"
Constraints: leaf icon must appear as standalone brand mark on bottle; brand name "Evergreen" visible on product; color palette must reflect #A3CEF1 / #F1B2DC / #C0C0C0; images must look like real Amazon listing photos
Avoid: cartoon or illustrated style, cluttered background on hero shot, oversaturated colors, watermark, deformed bottle shape
